sourcesContent:
import React from 'react'; import './HeatmapDashboard.css'; const HeatmapDashboard = ({ language }) => { const [dateRange, setDateRange] = useState('7days'); const content = { en: { title: 'Severity Heatmap Dashboard', totalCases: 'Total Cases', highSeverity: 'High Severity', patternAlerts: 'Pattern Alerts', locations: 'Locations', hostel: 'Hostels', department: 'Departments', campus: 'Campus Areas', offCampus: 'Off-Campus', alerts: 'Pattern Alerts', analytics: 'Analytics', crisisBreakdown: 'Crisis Type Breakdown', exportData: 'Export Data', dateRange: 'Date Range', last7days: 'Last 7 Days', last30days: 'Last 30 Days', last90days: 'Last 90 Days' }, hi: { title: 'गंभीरता हीटमैप डैशबोर्ड', totalCases: 'कुल मामले', highSeverity: 'उच्च गंभीरता', patternAlerts: 'पैटर्न अलर्ट', locations: 'स्थान', hostel: 'छात्रावास', department: 'विभाग', campus: 'कैंपस क्षेत्र', offCampus: 'कैंपस के बाहर', alerts: 'पैटर्न अलर्ट', analytics: 'विश्लेषण', crisisBreakdown: 'संकट प्रकार विभाजन', exportData: 'डेटा निर्यात करें', dateRange: 'तिथि सीमा', last7days: 'पिछले 7 दिन', last30days: 'पिछले 30 दिन', last90days: 'पिछले 90 दिन' } }; const text = content[language] || content.en; // Mock data const stats = { total: 45, highSeverity: 12, patterns: 3 }; const locations = [ { name: text.hostel, count: 18, severity: 'high' }, { name: text.department, count: 15, severity: 'medium' }, { name: text.campus, count: 8, severity: 'low' }, { name: text.offCampus, count: 4, severity: 'medium' } ]; const patternAlerts = [ { id: 'CLUSTER-001', count: 5, location: text.hostel, severity: 'high', date: '2026-03-01' }, { id: 'CLUSTER-002', count: 4, location: text.department, severity: 'medium', date: '2026-02-28' }, { id: 'CLUSTER-003', count: 3, location: text.campus, severity: 'medium', date: '2026-02-27' } ]; const crisisTypes = [ { type: 'Harassment', count: 18, percentage: 40 }, { type: 'Ragging', count: 15, percentage: 33 }, { type: 'Cyberbullying', count: 8, percentage: 18 }, { type: 'Mental Health', count: 4, percentage: 9 } ]; const handleExport = () => { // In real implementation, generate CSV alert('Exporting aggregate data...'); }; return (

{text.title}

{stats.total}
{text.totalCases}
{stats.highSeverity}
{text.highSeverity}
{stats.patterns}
{text.patternAlerts}

{text.locations}

{locations.map((loc, i) => (
{loc.name}
{loc.count}
))}

🚨 {text.alerts}

{patternAlerts.map((alert) => (
{alert.id} {alert.severity}
{alert.count} cases detected at {alert.location}
{alert.date}
))}

📊 {text.analytics}

{text.crisisBreakdown}

{crisisTypes.map((crisis, i) => (
{crisis.type} {crisis.count}
{crisis.percentage}%
))}
); }; export default HeatmapDashboard;
